impact: The daemon was blocked because it repeatedly generated an import test that failed on a missing future module instead of only catching malformed Python after that module appears. This replacement lets autonomous work proceed while still adding the intended early py_compile/import guard for future extractor proposals.
summary: Add a syntax-first test that is harmless before the target extractor exists and strict once it is introduced.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-121: Add a one-file syntax-first import test for `ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements` that imports only that module and fails malformed Python before broad online trade permit requirement validation runs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
